sp_rel_widget_clone.payload: custom 0) { $window.open(item.url, '_self'); dismissModal(); } } }; $scope.trustAsHtml = function(string) { return $sce.trustAsHtml(string); }; function raiseAppseeEvent(data) { if (!data.isNew) { return; } var payload = {}; payload.name = "Guided Self-service Started"; payload.data = {}; payload.data["Guided Self-service"] = data.processName; payload.data["User Id"] = data.userId; payload.data["Source"] = data.source; snAnalytics.addEvent(payload); } function dismissModal() { if (c.data.renderedFromMenuItem) { $scope.$parent.$parent.$dismiss(); } } };]]>c$border-primary: #8790A1 !default; $border-secondary: #B3B7BC !default; $border-tertiary: #DADDE2 !default; $text-primary: #1D2223 !default; $border-radius-base: 4px !default; $sp-panel-box-shadow: 0 4px 8px 0 rgba(23, 40, 52, 0.08) !default; $headings-font-weight: 600 !default; $sp-space--xs: 8px !default; $sp-space--md: 12px !default; $sp-space--lg: 16px !default; $font-size-base: 16px !default; $sp-space--xl: 24px !default; .card-container { min-height: 88px; display: flex; align-items: center; max-height: 120px; height: 100%; } .parent-container { max-height: 70vh; overflow-y: scroll; } .content-container { padding: $sp-space--lg; align-items: center; display: grid; height: 100%; } .icon-container { margin-left: $sp-space--lg; display: flex; align-items: center; } img { height: 56px; width: 56px; } .parent-content-container { display: flex; flex-direction: row; } .content-title { color: $text-primary; font-size: $font-size-base; font-weight: $headings-font-weight; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .webkit-clamp-1 { -webkit-line-clamp: 1; } .webkit-clamp-2 { -webkit-line-clamp: 2; } .fa-folder-open { font-size: 52px; color: $text-tertiary; } .empty-content-title { color: $text-primary; font-size: $font-size-h4; font-weight: $headings-font-weight; margin-top: $sp-space--md; } .empty-content { font-size: $font-size-base; color: $text-secondary; font-size: $font-size-base; font-weight: 400; margin-top: $sp-space--md; width: 60%; } .empty-section { margin-top: 26px; margin-bottom: 26px; } .link-desc { color: $text-primary; font-size: $font-size-base; } .flex-container { display: grid; flex-wrap: wrap; height: inherit; width: inherit; row-gap: $sp-space--lg; column-gap: $sp-space--lg; justify-content: space-between; } .flex-container-cols { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(27rem, 1fr)); } .flex-container-cols-modal { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(23.8rem, 1fr)); } .menu-item-margin { margin: 16px; } .col { border: 1px solid $border-tertiary; border-radius: $border-radius-base; flex-direction: column; } .content { -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; margin-top: $sp-space--xs; height: 100%; display: block; } .panel-body { padding: 24px; } a.card-container{ border-radius: $border-radius-base; } .col:hover { box-shadow: $sp-panel-box-shadow; } @media (max-width: 750px) { .col { flex-basis: 100%; } } .link-desc { display: -webkit-box; } @media (max-width: 430px) { .flex-container-cols-modal { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .flex-container-cols { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } .skeleton-loader { background: rgb(239, 241, 246) no-repeat; background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)); border-radius: 4px; animation: progress 2s ease-in-out infinite; } sp_instancetrueec-get-supportfalse= contentLeft && aRight <= contentRight && aTop >= contentTop && aBottom <= contentBottom)) aTag[j].tabIndex = -1; } } }); }]]>Get Support[{"name":"title","hint":"Title name of the widget","label":"Title","type":"string","default_value":"Get support"},{"name":"load_config","section":"other","default_value":"async","label":"Load configuration","type":"choice","choices":[{"label":"Synchronous","value":"sync"},{"label":"Asynchronous","value":"async"}]},{"hint":"Shows empty state if the widget content is empty.","name":"show_empty_state","section":"other","default_value":"false","label":"Show empty state","type":"boolean"}]falsefalsesp_widgetadmin2023-07-21 10:38:3079e98d67434831107d2f52cba5b8f2cc631Get Support4249e63a28d54d61bb6fbf61fd86cccb4249e63a28d54d61bb6fbf61fd86cccbsp_widget_79e98d67434831107d2f52cba5b8f2ccadmin2024-10-14 17:15:28
